channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 11.5%.

item.title: Bloomberg.com: Starmer to Roll Out UK Job Center Tools to Beat AI Work Threat - Bloomberg.com
item.description: Starmer to Roll Out UK Job Center Tools to Beat AI Work Threat - Bloomberg.com

item.title: Reuters: Zelenskiy in London for talks with Starmer, Macron and Merz - Reuters
item.description: Zelenskiy in London for talks with Starmer, Macron and Merz - Reuters

item.title: Independent UK Politics: ‘OK, I need to call work’: Meet the new councillors who never expected to get elected
item.description: ‘OK, I need to call work’: Meet the new councillors who never expected to get elected

item.title: i Politics: The hospitals, trains and housing that could be cut to fund fight against Putin
item.description: The hospitals, trains and housing that could be cut to fund fight against Putin

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): UK readies sanctions against Israel to deter proposed illegal West Bank settlement
item.description: UK readies sanctions against Israel to deter proposed illegal West Bank settlement

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): David Lammy: I told JD Vance he was wrong about Henry Nowak murder
